Hero.headlineLead: I BUILD THINGS THAT MAKE YOUR BUSINESS
Hero.subtitle: From phone apps to website automation — I help you reach more customers and build a reputation that sticks.

Services.intro: Three ways I help businesses move faster and look the part — built to fit how you actually work.

items.title: Custom Apps & Websites
items.description: Phone apps and websites built for your customers, not just for show. Fast, reliable, and made to convert.

items.title: Automation Tools
items.description: Stop doing manually what a system can handle. I connect your tools so the busywork runs itself.

items.title: Stronger Reputation
items.description: Look and feel like the business you're becoming. Brand, design, and experience that earn trust on sight.

Work.indexSubtitle: A selection of apps, automation systems, and brands I've shipped.

bloom-commerce.title: Bloom Commerce
bloom-commerce.description: A headless storefront and mobile app that turned a local shop into a national brand.
bloom-commerce.challenge: A growing retailer was losing sales to a slow, clunky checkout and had no mobile presence.
bloom-commerce.build: A headless e-commerce platform with a native app, one-tap checkout, and a self-serve content system.
bloom-commerce.result: Revenue grew 127% in six months and mobile became the top sales channel.

atlas-logistics.title: Atlas Logistics
atlas-logistics.description: An operations hub that automated dispatch, tracking, and invoicing end to end.
atlas-logistics.challenge: The team ran everything on spreadsheets and phone calls, losing hours to manual coordination.
atlas-logistics.build: A custom operations platform that automates dispatch, live tracking, and invoicing in one flow.
atlas-logistics.result: The team reclaimed 40 hours a week and cut billing errors to near zero.

nexus-health.title: Nexus Health
nexus-health.description: A patient portal that made booking, reminders, and records effortless.
nexus-health.challenge: Patients struggled to book appointments and no-shows were eating into the clinic's revenue.
nexus-health.build: A friendly patient portal with online booking, automated reminders, and secure records.
nexus-health.result: Bookings tripled and no-shows dropped by half within the first quarter.

verde-studio.title: Verde Studio
verde-studio.description: A full rebrand and website that repositioned a studio as a premium player.
verde-studio.challenge: A talented design studio looked dated and was attracting the wrong kind of clients.
verde-studio.build: A complete rebrand and a fast, editorial website that shows the work front and center.
verde-studio.result: Qualified leads grew 2.5x and average project value doubled.

pulse-fitness.title: Pulse Fitness
pulse-fitness.description: A coaching app with workout tracking, plans, and a community feed.
pulse-fitness.challenge: A coach wanted to scale beyond in-person sessions without losing the personal touch.
pulse-fitness.build: A mobile app with custom plans, progress tracking, and a motivating community feed.
pulse-fitness.result: The app passed 50,000 downloads and built a recurring membership base.

meridian-finance.title: Meridian Finance
meridian-finance.description: A reporting dashboard that replaced a week of spreadsheets with live data.
meridian-finance.challenge: Leadership waited a week each month for reports stitched together by hand.
meridian-finance.build: A live analytics dashboard that pulls every source into one real-time view.
meridian-finance.result: Manual reporting dropped 60% and decisions now happen on current data.

articles.title: Why automation beats hustle every time
articles.excerpt: Working harder has a ceiling. Systems don't. Here's how to find the tasks worth automating first.

articles.title: Design that converts, not just impresses
articles.excerpt: Pretty doesn't pay the bills. A look at the design decisions that actually move the numbers.

articles.title: App or website: what your business actually needs
articles.excerpt: The honest answer is 'it depends' — but on what? A simple framework to decide with confidence.

About.heading1: I turn complex ideas into things people
About.body1: I'm Fady Eilia — a builder who lives where strategy, design, and engineering meet. For the last several years I've helped businesses ship apps, automate the work that slows them down, and build brands that earn trust.
About.body2: I care about outcomes, not buzzwords. Whether it's a phone app, an internal tool, or a full rebrand, the goal is the same: make your business work harder so you don't have to.

Contact.subtitle: Tell me what you're working on. I'll reply within a day with honest thoughts on how to make it real.

Footer.tagline: Apps, automation, and brands that make your business work harder.
